_help.blender_exe: 'auto' = newest C:\Program Files\Blender Foundation install, or $BLENDER, or a full path
_help.code_regex: extracts the planner part code from the object name; '' = use object name as-is
_help.name_template: GLB node + file name. {code}=regex match, {name}=raw object name
_help.skip: true = leave this job out of the run

jobs.name: 185 Decor Drawers
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\185\GEN2 GLB Exporter - 185 Decor Drawers.blend

jobs.name: 185 Cases
jobs._note: Objects named '185-XW-XH Case'. Seam print-bridges (islands <80 verts AND <2mm thick) are dropped at export; source .blend is untouched.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\185\GEN2 GLB Exporter - 185 Cases.blend

jobs.name: 185 Covers + Footrails
jobs._note: CL/CU covers + FR-L/FR-U footrails, 185, 1W+2W. Modeled at assembly height; rebased to Y=0 per part. Clean meshes, no bridges. select:all = only these 8 meshes in the file.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\185\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Covers and Footrails.blend

jobs.name: Quicklocks (universal hardware)
jobs._note: Handed L/R pair, shared across all collections. Clean single meshes, no supports to drop.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Hardware\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 QuickLocks.blend

jobs.name: Tabletop Kit Foot (hardware)
jobs._note: Dovetail rail on top; pointy end (+X) leads insertion. Rotate 90/180 per slot at placement time -- see GEN2-Part-Orientation-Notes.md. GLB stays canonical.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Hardware\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Tabletop Kit Foot.blend

jobs.name: Drawer Stoppers (universal hardware)
jobs._note: Handed L/R pair. Clean single meshes, no supports.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Hardware\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Drawer Stoppers.blend

jobs.name: Magnet Clip (universal hardware)
jobs._note: Posed -90X in source (back-facing = case orientation); worker bakes the world orientation. Case=yaw0, drawer=yaw180. See GEN2-Part-Orientation-Notes.md.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Hardware\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Magnet Clip.blend

jobs.name: Essential Faceplates (185 Decor Drawers)
jobs._note: Posed -90X; worker bakes orientation. Snap onto Decor Drawer fronts (1:1 by W-H). Handle screws on via 2 centered holes. regex \d+W-\d+ + template re-adds H, normalizing the '2W-05' source typo.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Decor Faceplates\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Faceplates - Essential.blend

jobs.name: Deco Handle (self-tapping)
jobs._note: Screws onto the faceplate front via 2 centered holes. Identity transform. Source mesh 'Deco Handle - Self-Tapping' -- other mount variants may follow as separate GLBs.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Decor Faceplates\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Handles - Deco.blend

jobs.name: Wall Mount Lite brackets
jobs._note: 3W tilt fixed in source (now flat, 264x6.9x56), so all 3 brackets export cleanly via this job. The WoodScrew is separate -- it needs decimating ~62k->1.5k tris (worker has no decimate option yet), exported manually to WallMount/. select:'Wall Mount Lite' matches the 3 brackets, not the screw.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Hardware\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Wall Mount Brackets.blend

jobs.name: Under-Table Rails (185)
jobs._note: 185 under-table mount rails, 1W-4W. Posed 180X in source (female channels face down); worker bakes it. Clean single meshes, no bridges.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Hardware\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Under-Table Rails.blend

jobs.name: EdgeLabel Faceplates (185)
jobs._note: 18 sizes. Body+GRIP MERGED into one object per size = 2 material slots -> 2 primitives. export_materials=EXPORT keeps tiny named BODY/GRIP zone stubs so the viewer tints each zone (law #2 relaxed to zone tags). NO handle part -- the grip is integral to the print. Object names are already part-code -> name_template {name}.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Decor Faceplates\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Faceplates - EdgeLabel B.blend

jobs.name: EdgeLabel Accents (185)
jobs._note: 14 accents (none on the four 05H sizes). Separate print (designed face-down for texture/holo). Single ACCENT zone -> export_materials stays NONE. Shared per-size with the upcoming Classic Pro faceplate.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Decor Faceplates\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Faceplates - EdgeLabel B.blend

jobs.name: EdgeLabel Back Covers (185)
jobs._note: 18 OPTIONAL back covers (fill the new Decor drawer front gap; toggle off = backwards-compat with older closed-front drawers). Single zone.
jobs.blend: D:\Code Projects\GEN2 Visual Animator\Blender Files\Decor Faceplates\GEN2 GLB Exporter - GEN2 Faceplates - EdgeLabel B.blend

jobs.name: EdgeLabel Label (universal)
jobs._note: ONE universal swappable label (same part as the EdgeLabel generator). All 18 collections share one linked mesh; the authoritative object is named Label_EdgeLabel so this prefix matches exactly one -> exports once.
